roles.headline: Now Hiring.
roles.meta: Baristas, kitchen, floor, and shift leads. We're hiring across every station.

items.title: Barista & Boba
items.summary: Pull espresso, shake fruit teas, cook tapioca. The bar runs on you.
bullets: Craft coffee, fruit tea, handmade boba
Keep the bar clean, quick, dialed in
Know the menu and share it

items.title: Kitchen & Deli
items.summary: Toast bagels, build banh mi, prep daily. Small kitchen, big care, a line that moves.
bullets: Banh mi and bagels made to order
Food safety first, speed close behind

items.title: Market & Floor
items.summary: Face the shelves, help neighbors find what they need, make the store feel like home.
bullets: Own the details: shelves, signs, tone

items.title: Shift Lead & Growth
items.summary: Run a shift, coach a teammate, set the pace. New stores are coming. We're looking for the people who'll run them.
bullets: Grow with us as new stores open

items.label: Shift Meal
items.desc: Banh mi or bagel, on us, every shift.

items.label: Drinks On Shift
items.desc: Coffee, tea, boba — yours while you work.

items.label: Flexible Hours
items.desc: We build around school, second jobs, family.

items.label: Growth Path
items.desc: Three stores by 2026. Lead one of them.

items.label: Grocery Discount
items.desc: Staff pricing on pantry and produce.

items.label: Paid Training
items.desc: We pay you to learn espresso, boba, banh mi.

items.label: Team That Shows Up
items.desc: Small hive. We cover each other.

values.headline: The Kind Of Human We're Looking For.
values.meta: Skills we'll teach. These are the traits we hire for.

items.title: Hospitality-first
items.desc: You see customers as neighbors. A good morning from you makes someone's day.

items.title: Curious
items.desc: You want to know why, not just how. You ask about the sauces, the coffee bean, the bagel recipe.

items.title: Calm under rush
items.desc: Saturday lunch hits. You don't flinch. You get tighter, faster, kinder.

items.title: Team over ego
items.desc: The hive works together. You jump in, clean up, cover the line.

items.title: Pride in craft
items.desc: A banh mi made right, a latte pulled well, a shelf faced clean. Small things, done well.

apply.headline: Ready To Apply?
apply.sub: Tell us who you are, what you want to do, and why us. Every application gets read.
apply.emailBody:
Hi Yellow Bee team,

I'd like to apply for a role at your shop.

Name:
Role interest (Barista, Kitchen, Market, Shift Lead):
Availability:
Why Yellow Bee:

(Attach your resume to this email.)

Thanks!
